description: Reproducibility manifest for bilateral FL feature suppression vs differential privacy experiments.

data/home_A.parquet.description: Home A IP-deidentified flow records (11.9 days, 1,245,549 flows; src_ip/dst_ip removed)

data/home_B.parquet.description: Home B IP-deidentified extended flow records (11.5 days, 682,561 flows; src_ip/dst_ip removed)

expected_outputs.results/audit_log.json: Preprocessing audit (flow counts at each filter stage)
expected_outputs.results/baseline_16/seed_{SEED}/{CONFIG}: Per-round metrics for each seed x config (25 files)
expected_outputs.results/temporal_split_check.json: Small-model earlier-80%/later-20% temporal holdout sanity check
expected_outputs.results/temporal_split_check_medium.json: Medium-model earlier-80%/later-20% temporal holdout sanity check
expected_outputs.results/paper_numbers.json: Canonical numbers extracted for LaTeX tables
expected_outputs.figures/*.pdf: Generated figures (class distribution, paired deltas, convergence)
